product_brief: Build a premium web service that turns a creator's rough YouTube-based content idea into a batchable short-form production plan with script hooks, shot lists, and repurposing lanes.
forbidden_patterns: plain textarea and result card layout
acceptance_checks: first screen shows content workflow objects instead of KPI tiles
user can generate and save at least one production batch

product_brief: Build a visually rich trip-planning service that converts a travel inspiration video into an itinerary, route cards, backup plans, and a weekend-ready board someone would actually want to screenshot and use.
forbidden_patterns: blank hero with a single input box
acceptance_checks: first fold already looks like a travel artifact
user can save at least one itinerary snapshot
result language uses travel nouns and place cues

domain: budget reset and cash runway planning
product_brief: Build a finance planning service that turns a reset-style money brief into a visible runway plan with buckets, risk scenarios, and decisive tradeoff recommendations rather than a spreadsheet clone.
acceptance_checks: money objects appear above the fold
user can save at least one scenario plan

domain: interview skill sprint and learning planner
product_brief: Build a study and interview-prep web service that turns a role target into a tactical sprint plan with drills, review cadence, checkpoints, and saved preparation runs.
forbidden_patterns: marketing landing page without a real planner
acceptance_checks: the first screen shows a real plan structure
user can generate and save at least one sprint
copy uses learning and interview vocabulary

domain: meal prep and grocery planning assistant
product_brief: Build a consumer meal-prep planner that turns a weekly grocery and cooking inspiration video into a prep schedule, grocery map, recipe slots, and reusable saved meal boards.
forbidden_patterns: empty hero plus single results panel
acceptance_checks: the first fold shows prep objects, not KPIs
user can save at least one weekly meal board
results feel practical enough to cook from
